inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
mchSourceLoyalty = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.checkIfPrimaryCRMMCH(fileRow.SourceNr, CorrelationId, fileName);
mchDestinationLoyalty = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.checkIfPrimaryCRMMCH(fileRow.DestinationNr, CorrelationId, fileName);

szSourceLoyalty = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.checkIfPrimaryCRMSZ(fileRow.SourceNr, CorrelationId, fileName);
szDestinationLoyalty = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.checkIfPrimaryCRMSZ(fileRow.DestinationNr, CorrelationId, fileName);
//------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
mchSourceLoyaltyPortal = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.checkIfPrimaryPortalMCH(fileRow.SourceNr, CorrelationId, fileName);
mchDestinationLoyaltyPortal = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.checkIfPrimaryPortalMCH(fileRow.DestinationNr, CorrelationId, fileName);

szSourceLoyaltyPortal = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.checkIfPrimaryPortalSZ(fileRow.SourceNr, CorrelationId, fileName);
szDestinationLoyaltyPortal = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.checkIfPrimaryPortalSZ(fileRow.DestinationNr, CorrelationId, fileName);

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
// init MergeRequest object for MCH  
mergeRequest = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountRequest();
mergeRequest.DestinationCardNumber = fileRow.DestinationNr;
mergeRequest.SourceCardNumber = fileRow.SourceNr;
mergeRequest.Ensign = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.SystemEnsign.MCH;

autoMergeReponseMch = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMerge();
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.VLL = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
accountSrc = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AccountInfo();
accountDst = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AccountInfo();
accountSrc = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.GetInfosUniversoAccountNumber(fileRow.SourceNr,
    MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.SystemEnsign.MCH,CorrelationId);

accountDst = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.GetInfosUniversoAccountNumber(fileRow.DestinationNr, 
    MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.SystemEnsign.MCH,CorrelationId);

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
// VLL
autoMergeReponseMch.VLL = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();
autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Message = System.String.Format("VLL Retrieve returned with errors: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}", fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);

autoMergeReponseSz.VLL = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseSz.VLL = autoMergeReponseMch.VLL;

// CRM
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Message = System.String.Format("VLL Retrieve returned with errors: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);

autoMergeReponseSz.CRM = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseSz.CRM = autoMergeReponseMch.CRM;

// Portal
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Message = System.String.Format("VLL Retrieve returned with errors: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);

autoMergeReponseSz.Portal = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseSz.Portal = autoMergeReponseMch.Portal;

universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeMCH = autoMergeReponseMch;
universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeSZ = autoMergeReponseSz;


// write error to database
if (accountDst.Error != null){
    MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteErrorLog(accountDst.Error, fileName);
}

if(accountSrc.Error != null){
MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteErrorLog(accountSrc.Error, fileName);
}

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
if(!hasErrorFile){
    if(nTotalCards ==  index - 1)
    {
        MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteToFile(
        fileRow.SourceNr,  fileRow.SourceNif, fileRow.DestinationNr, fileRow.DestinationNif,
        CorrelationId, true, fileName);
    }
    else{
        MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteToFile(
        fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.SourceNif, fileRow.DestinationNr, fileRow.DestinationNif,
        CorrelationId, false, fileName);
    }
    hasErrorFile = true;
}

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
autoMergeResponseMchVll = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeResponseMchVll.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Success.ToString();
autoMergeResponseMchVll.Message = "VLL Merge já foi efectuado on MCH";

autoMergeReponseMch.VLL = autoMergeResponseMchVll;

universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeMCH.VLL= autoMergeResponseMchVll;

// mark operation as Succeed
MCHMergeSucceedOnVLL = true;

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value: MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.ActivateTemporaryCard(fileRow.SourceNr,CorrelationId,fileName);

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Success.ToString();
autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Message = "Merge Succeeded";

mergeResponse.MergeResultStatus = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Success;

universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeMCH.VLL = autoMergeReponseMch.VLL;

// mark operation as Succeed
MCHMergeSucceedOnVLL = true;

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
// perform the merge VLL 
mergeResponse = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.MergeAccountVLL(mergeRequest,CorrelationId);

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteErrorLog(mergeResponse.Error, fileName);

autoMergeReponseMchVll = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMchVll.Result = mergeResponse.MergeResultStatus.ToString();
autoMergeReponseMchVll.Message = System.String.Format("Failure on WebService {0} - WebMethod {1}", mergeResponse.Error.WebService, mergeResponse.Error.WebMethod);

autoMergeReponseMch.VLL = autoMergeReponseMchVll;
universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeMCH.VLL = autoMergeReponseMchVll;

// mark operation as not Succeed
MCHMergeSucceedOnVLL = false;

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:

    if(nTotalCards ==  index - 1)
    {
        MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteToFile(
        fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.SourceNif, fileRow.DestinationNr, fileRow.DestinationNif,

        fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.SourceNif, fileRow.DestinationNr, fileRow.DestinationNif,

    }
hasErrorFile = true;
}

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
// CRM
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Message = System.String.Format("Two accounts on CRM will be merged only if the merge is succeed on VLL.");

// Portal
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Message = System.String.Format("Two accounts on Portal will be merged only if the merge is succeed on VLL.");

universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeMCH = autoMergeReponseMch;

// write error to database
mchError = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.Error();
mchError.Insignia = "MCH";
mchError.Sistema = "VLL";
mchError.Message = "";
mchError.ExceptionType = "";
mchError.FaultException = System.String.Format("As the merge operation failed on VLL, the accounts will not be merged on CRM and Portal.");
mchError.WebService = "";
mchError.WebMethod = "";
mchError.Response = "";
mchError.CorrelationId = CorrelationId;

MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteErrorLog(mchError, fileName);

    hasErrorFile = true;
}

// CRM

autoMergeReponseSz.CRM.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();
autoMergeReponseSz.CRM.Message = System.String.Format("Two accounts on CRM will be merged only if the merge is succeed on VLL.");

// Portal
autoMergeReponseSz.Portal = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseSz.Portal.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();
autoMergeReponseSz.Portal.Message = System.String.Format("Two accounts on Portal will be merged only if the merge is succeed on VLL.");

universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeSZ = autoMergeReponseSz;

// write error to database
szError = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.Error();
szError.Insignia = "MCH";
szError.Sistema = "VLL";
szError.Message = "";
szError.ExceptionType = "";
szError.FaultException = System.String.Format("As the merge operation failed on VLL, the accounts will not be merged on CRM and Portal.");
szError.WebService = "";
szError.WebMethod = "";
szError.Response = "";
szError.CorrelationId = CorrelationId;

MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteErrorLog(szError, fileName);

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
// VLL
autoMergeReponseMch.VLL = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();

// CRM
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();

// Portal
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.AutoMergeReponse();
autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Result = MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.OperationStatus.Failed.ToString();

if (System.String.IsNullOrEmpty( mchDestinationLoyalty ) || System.String.IsNullOrEmpty(mchDestinationLoyaltyPortal))
{        
    autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Message = System.String.Format("DestinationCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}", fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
    autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Message = System.String.Format("DestinationCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
    autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Message = System.String.Format("DestinationCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
}
else if(System.String.IsNullOrEmpty(mchSourceLoyalty) || System.String.IsNullOrEmpty(mchSourceLoyaltyPortal))
{
    autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Message = System.String.Format("SourceCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}", fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
    autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Message = System.String.Format("SourceCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
    autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Message = System.String.Format("SourceCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
}
universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeMCH = autoMergeReponseMch;

if (System.String.IsNullOrEmpty( szDestinationLoyalty ) || System.String.IsNullOrEmpty(szDestinationLoyaltyPortal))
{        
    autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Message = System.String.Format("DestinationCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}", fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
    autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Message = System.String.Format("DestinationCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
    autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Message = System.String.Format("DestinationCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
}
else if(System.String.IsNullOrEmpty(szSourceLoyalty) || System.String.IsNullOrEmpty(szSourceLoyaltyPortal))
{
    autoMergeReponseMch.VLL.Message = System.String.Format("SourceCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}", fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
    autoMergeReponseMch.CRM.Message = System.String.Format("SourceCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
    autoMergeReponseMch.Portal.Message = System.String.Format("SourceCard Does not exist in CRM or Portal: Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
}


autoMergeReponseSz = autoMergeReponseMch;

universoAutoMergeResponse.AutoMergeSZ = autoMergeReponseMch;

// write error to database
Error = new MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.Error();
Error.Insignia = "MCH";
Error.Sistema = "ALL";
Error.Message = "";
Error.ExceptionType = "InexistentCard";
Error.FaultException = System.String.Format("At least one of the card numbers does not exist in CRM or Portal > Source Card {0} - Destination Card {1}",  fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.DestinationNr);
Error.WebService = "AutoMerge";
Error.WebMethod = "AutoMerge_Orchestration";
Error.Response = "";
Error.CorrelationId = CorrelationId;

MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteErrorLog(Error, fileName);

inputs.name: variable
inputs.value:
if(nTotalCards ==  index - 1)
{
    MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteToFile(
    fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.SourceNif, fileRow.DestinationNr, fileRow.DestinationNif,
    CorrelationId, true, fileName);
}
else{
    MCH.SZ.UniversoAutoMerge.Biztalk.Support.MergeAccountSupport.WriteToFile(
    fileRow.SourceNr, fileRow.SourceNif, fileRow.DestinationNr, fileRow.DestinationNif,
    CorrelationId, false, fileName);
}

hasErrorFile = true;
